common_consistency_tests: compare synopsis values against detailed sections and registry fields
notes: Synopsis is short but repeats most high-value facts.

common_consistency_tests: check rationale does not imply unsupported population or endpoint claims
notes: Mostly semantic and evidence-linked checks.

common_consistency_tests: ensure endpoint names, hierarchy and timepoints match SAP and registry
notes: Core unit for Trial Fact Sheet.

common_consistency_tests: check sample size, allocation ratio, phase and design type consistency
notes: High dependency with SAP and synopsis.

common_consistency_tests: check thresholds and terms against ICF and registry eligibility
notes: Contains many list-level facts.

common_consistency_tests: check dose, route, frequency, arm labels and duration consistency
notes: Links to ICF procedures and SoA.

common_consistency_tests: check all visits and assessment windows agree with text and ICF
notes: SoA is the strongest visual dependency hub.

common_consistency_tests: check AE windows, safety labs and monitoring align with risk statements
notes: Connects protocol, ICF and SAP.

common_consistency_tests: check endpoint-method-population-estimand alignment
notes: Requires deterministic and semantic tests.

common_consistency_tests: check amendment rationale links to changed facts and affected units
notes: Change trace anchor.

common_consistency_tests: check exact endpoint definitions and windows against protocol
notes: SAP should not silently redefine endpoints.

common_consistency_tests: check analysis sets are defined and used consistently
notes: Important for downstream tables.

common_consistency_tests: check primary method, sensitivity methods and estimand links
notes: Needs statistics reviewer.

common_consistency_tests: check patient-facing purpose does not overclaim benefit
notes: Good place for safety and ethics review.

common_consistency_tests: check procedures match protocol visits and intervention descriptions
notes: Participant-facing consistency target.

common_consistency_tests: check risk statements align with safety monitoring and burden
notes: Ethics-sensitive unit.

common_consistency_tests: check registry design fields mirror approved protocol
notes: Registry is a structured external representation.

common_consistency_tests: check outcome names, measure type and time frame against protocol/SAP
notes: Classic stale-value location after endpoint change.

common_consistency_tests: check CSR protocol summary reflects final approved protocol version
notes: Useful later for end-to-end lifecycle story.

common_consistency_tests: check every changed fact has affected units and reviewer status
notes: This is a core TrialCompiler generated artifact.

common_consistency_tests: check deterministic conflicts, missing fields, stale text and semantic drift
notes: Main software output for Best Software style demonstration.

common_consistency_tests: check each active fact has source and review status
notes: Supports traceability and auditability.

common_consistency_tests: check timeline matches SoA, ICF and endpoint windows
notes: SPIRIT-style participant timeline unit.

common_consistency_tests: check PRO assessment windows match SoA, SAP and registry outcome time frames
notes: Only applies when PRO endpoints or assessments exist.

zh_name: 病例报告表与电子采集表
common_consistency_tests: check CRF fields match protocol endpoint, SoA, safety and eligibility requirements
notes: Execution-facing document/system unit.

common_consistency_tests: check treatment arms, randomization ratio, stratification and supply settings align with protocol/SAP
notes: Can be a later-stage graph node even if not in MVP.

common_consistency_tests: check edit checks reflect protocol thresholds and data collection windows
notes: Useful for demonstrating that document facts propagate into systems.

common_consistency_tests: check dose, route, blinding and supply instructions align with protocol
notes: Execution manual connected to intervention facts.

common_consistency_tests: check lab collection windows and safety assessments align with SoA and protocol
notes: Manual node for later graph expansion.

common_consistency_tests: check imaging schedule and endpoint assessment windows align with protocol and SoA
notes: Optional depending on trial type.
